content.en:
After a long time.

Ye Tian completely completed the breakthrough and cultivated to the early stage of the Fourth Realm.

As soon as he broke through to the fourth realm, he found that his strength had far surpassed the peak of the third realm, and his current combat power was among the top in the fourth realm.

After the breakthrough was completed, he replaced all the other replica bodies with the fourth realm replica bodies.

Subsequently, he took out the essence of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and once again used the extra-dimensional realm in his body to nourish the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and began to condense the essence of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd of the four realms.

"The multi-dimensional treasure essence of the four realms should have a more obvious effect on improving the innate multi-dimensional Dao body!"

However, the essence of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Gourd is not so easy to condense, even if Ye Tian frantically urges the Origin of the Extra-Dimensional Realm in his body to nourish the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Gourd, it will take at least ten extra-dimensional epochs for "One Ninety-Three" to be able to condense a drop of the Four-Realm Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence.

In the blink of an eye, ten extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

A drop of the essence of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Gourd was condensed.

Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp, and used it to enhance the body of the black mother.

Rumble!!!

As if she had been starving for countless years, the body of the black mother was constantly absorbing the energy of the essence of the multi-dimensional treasure of the four realms, and it was rapidly refining.

The effect is amazing!

"Very good, according to this efficiency, it won't be long before I can cultivate the first layer of Wumu's body to the Dacheng realm, and I can also cultivate the Ka Ye wisdom body to the first layer of Dacheng limit and even the second layer realm. "

In the following days, Ye Tian would do his best to nourish the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, condense the essence of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd of the four realms, and then use it to improve his cultivation.

Since it also takes time to refine the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, once a drop of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence is exhausted, the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Treasure Essence condenses another drop of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, which is enough to ensure that he has always had a supply of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, and there will never be a shortage of this Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence.

In this way, one extradimensional epoch after another passed.

Before you know it, dozens of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Wumu body completed a breakthrough and reached the first level of Dacheng realm, and his physical fitness skyrocketed many times.

After that, a period of time passed, and the Ka Ye intelligent body reached the limit of the first layer of Dacheng, and then it was necessary to break the shackles and advance to the second level of the realm.

For this.

Ye Tian began to accumulate the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, because a drop of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence may not be able to guarantee that he will break the shackles, so he naturally has to accumulate some more Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence.

In this way, some days passed, and he had accumulated ten drops of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, and only then did he begin to impact the second level of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

A place of retreat and practice.

Ye Tian swallowed ten drops of the Four Realms Multidimensional Treasure Essence in one go, and then began to attack the bottleneck of the Jiaye Wisdom Body.

Thundered!!!!

Under the impact again and again, the energy of the essence of the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Treasure exploded directly impacted the bottleneck shackles.

In an instant, the wisdom of the Kaba body ushered in a metamorphosis, his physical fitness skyrocketed every moment, and his healing ability became extremely terrifying.

The key is that the innate multi-dimensional secret technique of multi-dimensional wisdom light, which is most worthy of Ye Tian's attention, is far more than in the past, and the ability to assist in comprehending the super-dimensional rules will inevitably be greatly improved.

This also means that Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm will also improve faster in the future.

Soon, the second layer of the Kasa wisdom body completely stabilized.

"The breakthrough of the Ka Ye wisdom body, the increase in physical fitness is not high, but it is of great help to me, and the next few days will still focus on improving the body of the black mother, this innate multi-dimensional Dao body is the innate multi-dimensional Dao body with the largest increase in combat power, far from being comparable to the Ka Ye wisdom body!"

Ye Tian spent a lot of time improving the body of the black mother, and at the same time, he was also contemplating and cultivating the extradimensional rules.

But.

After Jiu Utu didn't help him much, it was extremely difficult for him to continue to improve his extradimensional rules.

Fortunately, he still has a soul vase, a multi-dimensional wisdom light, and after cultivating to break through to the fourth realm, the soul will transform, and the fit with the extra-dimensional rules is higher, and it is naturally easier to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules.

However.

His cultivation progress is very difficult, even if he has more cultivation and refining essence in the four realms, he can't improve his cultivation in a short period of time, and it will take a long time to improve his cultivation to the middle stage of the fourth realm.

And as time went on, progress in other areas slowed down.....

this day.

Ye Tian took out the black statue again for study, this was a black statue from the Kun Bronze Realm Lord, until today, he still didn't see the mystery of this black statue, it felt like an innate multi-dimensional treasure, but it didn't seem to be quite like it.

"I thought that after arriving in the fourth realm, I would be able to see the mystery of this black statue, but I didn't expect that I still couldn't see through it, and the texture was extremely tough, even I in the fourth realm couldn't damage it!"

Ye Tian was not disappointed, but even more excited, this means that the secret of this black statue is even greater, far beyond the imagination of the original Kuntong Realm Lord, maybe it is a treasure involving the Fifth Realm!

"At present, the progress of strength is slow, if we continue to cultivate slowly like this, even if another ten thousand extradimensional epochs have passed, the increase in strength will not be too large. Perhaps, I still have to enter the inheritance land of the Lord of the Wumu Realm once!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It is true that he is not allowed to enter the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord anymore, but if he enters as another third realm, he may not be hindered.

A fallen land of the inheritance of the lord of the Wumu Realm, not so much that even his replica body can be seen through.

Of course.

It's not without risk to pick up wool like this, in case it is detected by the means left behind by the black mother's body, but he can't control it so much now.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Death Void Area of the Land of the Black Mother Realm 1.2 Inheritance, in the past, his cultivation was only the third realm, even if he came, there was no way to enter the Land of Inheritance, and he did not have the key things of the Black Mother Realm Lord.

But now, he has cultivated to the fourth realm, and he has also cultivated the body of the black mother, and he can vaguely sense a wisp of breath in the inheritance land.

"Break it for me!"

Ye Tian's extra-dimensional rule realm exploded, analyzing the dimension little by little.

Soon, he found the dimension where the inheritance of the Lord of the Wumu Realm was located, and then tore his hands and directly tore open this dimension, allowing the copy body of the third realm to enter.

Swish!

The third realm copy body entered the inheritance land of the Black Mother Realm Lord.

"Hopefully this replica body can bring out some good things. "

Ye Tian muttered.
